hooks.prompt:
The user is about to run a git push which will auto-deploy the DGIS Fortaleza 2026 website to Vercel. Run a pre-publish review before allowing this.

Project directory: C:/Users/user/Documents/Claude projects/website for DGIS

Perform these checks in order:

1. BUILD — Run `npm run build` in the project directory. If it fails, block immediately with the build error.

2. CHANGED FILES — Run `git diff HEAD~1 --name-only` to see what changed. Read every changed .astro file.

3. CONTENT SCAN — In every changed file, look for: placeholder text (TODO, FIXME, Lorem ipsum, TBD, coming soon), wrong dates (course is Nov 6-13 2026), broken WhatsApp links, visible HTML tags as text.

4. IMAGES — Check that every image filename referenced in changed files exists in public/images/.

5. MULTILINGUAL — If a Spanish page changed, check the matching English (/en/) and French (/fr/) pages still have the same sections.

If any check fails:
- Return: decision=block
- reason: clearly list every issue found so the user can fix them before pushing

If all checks pass:
- Return: decision=allow
- reason: brief summary of what was reviewed and confirmed clean
hooks.statusMessage: Reviewing website before publishing to Vercel...
